WebLink.url: {! IF( OR(LEN($Site.Name) == 0, ISBLANK($Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c)), URLFOR("/apex/" + $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Namespace__c + "SendItineraryPDF?Id=" + Opportunity.Id), URLFOR($Site.Prefix & $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c & URLENCODE('/apex/" + $Setup.Site__c.Namespace__c + "SendItineraryPDF?Id=') + Opportunity.Id) ) }
